title: P2 — Minimum Composition State Schemas
description: One schema registry for the five allowed state objects. MetadataEnvelope is embedded and is not a sixth state object.

GoalContract.meta.object_id/schema_version/branch_id/: O1 on creation; selector validates but does not alter.
GoalContract.meta.revision/status/freshness/parent_re: O1 on a superseding revision; selector may mark an existing snapshot stale without changing its substantive fields.
GoalContract.target_ref/outcome_statement/obligations: O1 only; external-intake may seed source text but cannot commit normalized requiredness.

CapabilityModel.meta: O2 on creation or superseding revision; selector validates freshness.

EvidenceLedger.meta.revision/parent_refs/content_hash/a: ledger append coordinator applying authorized deltas from external-intake/O1/O2/O3.
EvidenceLedger.entries: append only by external-intake, O1, O2, or O3 according to source type; no operator may modify/delete prior entries; O4 is read-only.
EvidenceLedger.ledger_id/stage_vocabulary: fixed at ledger creation; never rewritten by an operator.

CoverageMap.meta: O3 on creation or superseding revision; selector validates freshness.
CoverageMap.capability_model_ref/goal_contract_ref/a: O3 only; no intervention or target-architecture field is legal.

ChangeDecision.meta: O4 on creation or superseding revision; selector validates freshness.
ChangeDecision.coverage_map_ref/decision/target_gap_ref: O4 only; O4 cannot write upstream facts.

x-revision-branch-stale-rules: Revision numbers are monotonic per object_id and branch_id; revision >1 requires exact parent refs.
A branch fork preserves the last common parent and changes branch_id; a merge is a new owner-produced revision with every live parent and resolution_basis.
Contested status requires conflict_refs; conflicts are never silently erased.
Exact parent ID/revision/branch/hash mismatch marks the downstream snapshot stale (MCP-E600).
Stale, invalid, or superseded objects remain auditable but are ineligible as current inputs.
A downstream object may consume contested branches only when its contract explicitly performs branch-specific assessment; universal decisions require invariance across branches.

x-error-codes.MCP-E001_METADATA_MISSING: Required metadata envelope missing or malformed.
x-error-codes.MCP-E020_ILLEGAL_WRITE_AUTHORITY: Producer attempted to write a field/object it does not own.
x-error-codes.MCP-E100_REQUIRED_OBLIGATION_MISSING: GoalContract has no explicit-required or entailed-required obligation.
x-error-codes.MCP-E110_ENTAILED_BASIS_MISSING: Entailed obligation lacks necessity basis and source.
x-error-codes.MCP-E120_COMPACT_REQUIREDNESS_LOST: Compact projection omits obligation class or basis.
x-error-codes.MCP-E200_GOAL_NOT_COMMITTED: CapabilityModel references a noncommitted, stale, or contested goal without branch handling.
x-error-codes.MCP-E210_TRACE_INCOMPLETE: Capability/obligation trace is empty or not bidirectional.
x-error-codes.MCP-E220_INDEPENDENCE_CONTAMINATION: O2 packet or output contains forbidden asset decomposition or component terms.
x-error-codes.MCP-E230_SILENT_MODEL_UNION: Materially disagreeing model branches were merged without owned re-derivation and resolution basis.
x-error-codes.MCP-E300_EVIDENCE_SCOPE_MISMATCH: Claim cites evidence outside its asset/version/branch/capability scope.
x-error-codes.MCP-E310_LEDGER_NONAPPEND_MUTATION: Evidence entry was deleted or modified rather than superseded.
x-error-codes.MCP-E320_CLAIM_EXCEEDS_STAGE: Claim stage exceeds cited evidence stage.
x-error-codes.MCP-E330_INFERENCE_STAGE_LAUNDERING: Model inference is represented above design-time or as observed evidence.
x-error-codes.MCP-E400_O3_BEFORE_O2: Coverage assessment lacks a committed current CapabilityModel.
x-error-codes.MCP-E410_COVERAGE_MISSING: A required capability lacks a coverage entry or explicit unknown classification.
x-error-codes.MCP-E420_IMPACT_FACTS_NOT_DECISION_READY: CoverageMap claims intervention readiness without complete reach, preservation, and unknown fields.
x-error-codes.MCP-E421_HIDDEN_IMPACT_JOB: O3 performed or implied a separate dependency-impact job rather than declaring it required.
x-error-codes.MCP-E430_O3_INTERVENTION_DECISION: CoverageMap contains an intervention selection or target architecture.
x-error-codes.MCP-E500_O4_WITHOUT_CURRENT_COVERAGE: ChangeDecision lacks a current committed CoverageMap.
x-error-codes.MCP-E510_O4_WITHOUT_IMPACT_KNOWLEDGE: O4 selects an intervention when CoverageMap is block-only or not-ready.
x-error-codes.MCP-E520_ACTION_EXCEEDS_IMPACT: Decision reach exceeds supplied impact facts or lacks target gaps.
x-error-codes.MCP-E530_O4_REANALYZED_COVERAGE: O4 rewrote coverage/impact facts instead of consuming them.
x-error-codes.MCP-E600_STALE_PARENT: Exact parent revision/hash no longer matches current state.
x-error-codes.MCP-E610_UNRESOLVED_BRANCH: Decision-material conflict was ignored or silently collapsed.
x-error-codes.MCP-E620_COMPACT_PROVENANCE_LOST: Compact projection cannot resolve parent, evidence, branch, or stop basis.

x-semantic-validation-rules: Required obligation IDs and capability IDs must be unique within an object.
Every required GoalContract obligation must appear in CapabilityModel.obligation_coverage; every capability obligation_ref must resolve.
A downstream ObjectRef must match exact object_id, revision, branch_id, and content_hash and the parent must be committed/current unless contested branches are explicitly allowed.
EvidenceLedger revisions are append-only: prior entries are byte-identical and new entries are appended; corrections use supersedes_evidence_id.
Every required capability has exactly one CoverageMap coverage entry per branch or explicit unknown; full-at-stage requires behavior refs and in-scope evidence.

CoverageMap contains no decision field. For each material gap, impact assessment must include gap type, origin-layer candidates, reach, first/second-degree dependencies, semantic centrality, preservation feasibility, completeness, unknowns, and O4 readiness.
If change_reach is broader-than-n-plus-1, second_degree_or_broader_refs or explicit systemic propagation facts must be nonempty.
If impact_job_required is true, o4_readiness must be block-only and O4 may only block; if o4_readiness is not-ready, selector must rerun/reject O3 rather than invoke O4.

O4 maps immutable O3 facts: local-defect + named-elements-only may support local-correction; missing-capability + n-plus-1 may support bounded-capability-addition; broader-than-n-plus-1 may support system-restructure; unknown/block-only requires blocked-by-insufficient-impact-knowledge.
A no-material-change decision requires no material gap and adequate coverage at the stated stage; optional items cannot populate target_gap_refs.

Compact projection retains obligation class+basis, capability traces, exact parent/evidence refs, evidence ceiling, branch/conflict status, O4 readiness, decision/stop basis, and ledger identity/digest.

x-invalidation-matrix.GoalContract outcome/requiredness/constr: CapabilityModel, CoverageMap, ChangeDecision stale; EvidenceLedger append-only remains current as history.
x-invalidation-matrix.New same-scope evidence: CoverageMap requires revalidation; ChangeDecision stale if any material conclusion changes or stage can be promoted.
x-invalidation-matrix.New higher-stage evidence: Only eligible CoverageMap claims and dependent ChangeDecision are reassessed; goals/capabilities remain current unless evidence changes their basis.
x-invalidation-matrix.Branch conflict introduced: Dependent objects become contested or branch-specific; universal decision prohibited unless invariant across branches.

x-projection-rules.material: Serialize all required fields and decision-useful optional fields.
x-projection-rules.compact: May omit optional narrative arrays and co-serialize objects in one packet, but may not omit requiredness basis, bidirectional traces, provenance/evidence ceiling, exact refs/hashes, branch/conflict/freshness, O4 readiness, decision and stop logic.
x-projection-rules.ledger-handoff: Carry either full ledger or a referenced-subset projection containing ledger_id, exact revision/digest, every evidence entry cited by the packet, omitted-entry count, and append delta. A subset cannot authorize a claim that depends on an omitted entry.

valid.outcome_statement: Safely write an authorized value and make the result observable.

obligations.statement: Confirm the committed result before reporting success.
obligations.basis: Without confirmation, safe completion cannot be established.

valid.profile_basis: Write authority and confirmation are coupled across tool and output behavior.

invalid.outcome_statement: Safely write an authorized value and make the result observable.
invalid.profile_basis: Write authority and confirmation are coupled across tool and output behavior.

capabilities.behavior: Determine whether the requested write is authorized before execution.
capabilities.success_condition: Unauthorized writes are rejected before tool execution.

capabilities.behavior: Verify the committed write result before reporting success.
capabilities.success_condition: Success is reported only from a matching committed result.

capabilities.behavior: Determine whether the requested write is authorized before execution.
capabilities.success_condition: Unauthorized writes are rejected before tool execution.

coverage_entries.rationale: The asset explicitly rejects unauthorized requests.
No post-write confirmation behavior is defined.

gap_entries.consequence: Success may be reported for an uncommitted or mismatched write.

impact_assessments.decision_ready_basis: The missing capability and all directly affected interfaces are enumerated; no N+2 propagation is documented.

overall_o4_readiness.basis: All material gaps have decision-ready reach facts.

gap_entries.consequence: Success may be reported for an uncommitted or mismatched write.

impact_assessments.decision_ready_basis: The missing capability and all directly affected interfaces are enumerated; no N+2 propagation is documented.

overall_o4_readiness.basis: All material gaps have decision-ready reach facts.

valid.decision_basis: A missing required capability is integrable within known first-degree interfaces.
verification_required: Run controlled write success, failure, and mismatch fixtures after implementation.
valid.stop_reason: Assessment decision complete; implementation is outside prototype scope.

invalid.decision_basis: A missing required capability is integrable within known first-degree interfaces.
verification_required: Run controlled write success, failure, and mismatch fixtures after implementation.
invalid.stop_reason: Assessment decision complete; implementation is outside prototype scope.
